subcodes.first_line: ...Thou hast asked about places of worship and the underlying reason therefor. The wisdom in raising up such buildings
subcodes.first_line_orig: از معابد سؤال نموده بوديد که حکمتش چيست حکمتش اين است که در وقت معلوم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @being a channel for the Holy Spirit in teaching the Cause, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @service to others; to the Cause of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
full_text_parts: Thou hast asked about places of worship and the underlying reason therefor. The wisdom in raising up such buildings is that at a given hour, the people should know it is time to meet, and all should gather together, and, harmoniously attuned one to another, engage in prayer; with the result that out of this coming together, unity and affection shall grow and flourish in the human heart.
